'''Savor Kibbs''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] who was rejected for [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] training by the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]].

==Biography==
Savor Kibbs had a strong connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]; even without formal training he had mastered some [[Force power]]s such as [[Mind trick/Legends|Affect Mind]] and [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force push]]. Kibbs decided to take advantage of the tumult that surrounded the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] unlawful [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] and the subsequent [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|battle]] to free that world so as to take control of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] for himself. A charismatic person, he managed to gather a group of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] to his side, influencing their minds with his Force powers; they then formed a group called the [[Renegade (organization)|Renegade]]. He was eventually defeated by a group of ex-members of the [[Naboo Underground]], who may have killed him.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|''Star Wars: Invasion of Theed'' Adventure Game]] {{1st}}
